# Extracted API Document for 中国移动云盘 (partial, auto-generated)

Generated by static analysis of app.asar. Descriptions are heuristic guesses.


## Global notes

- Auth: Utils.sendRequest adds header `Authorization: Basic ` + btoa("pc:"+window.UserInfo.account+":"+window.UserInfo.authToken) when UserInfo.authToken exists.

- Content-Type: defaults to application/json;charset=utf-8 when sending JSON, or application/xml for xml requests; Utils may convert data to XML for non-json options.

- Additional headers: options.appendHeads can add custom headers like `x-yun-sbox-session-id` or `x-yun-url-type`.

- Method: heuristically determined — many calls use POST when data argument is present.


---
